--------- Original Message ---------

Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 9:00 AM
To: Bob Forwarder <bob@example.com>
Subject: Your tickets for Spring Conference 2026
 

Dear Bob,

Your tickets for the Spring Conference 2026 are ready to be claimed. Please visit the conference portal and use your registration code.

Registration deadline: April 1, 2026

Best regards,
Conference Team
